code: const API_URL='https://jodaxi.onrender.com';const fetchAPI=async(endpoint,options)=>{const response=await fetch(`${API_URL}${endpoint}`,Object.assign({},options,{headers:Object.assign({'Content-Type':'application/json'},options?.headers)}));if(!response.ok){throw new Error(`HTTP error! status: ${response.status}`);}return response.json();};export const productAPI={getAll:async()=>{return fetchAPI('/api/products');},getById:async id=>{return fetchAPI(`/api/products/${id}`);},create:async producto=>{return fetchAPI('/api/products',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify(producto)});},update:async(id,producto)=>{return fetchAPI(`/api/products/${id}`,{method:'PUT',body:JSON.stringify(producto)});},delete:async id=>{return fetchAPI(`/api/products/${id}`,{method:'DELETE'});},getByUser:async userId=>{return fetchAPI(`/api/products/user/${userId}`);}};export const authAPI={login:async(email,password)=>{return fetchAPI('/api/auth/login',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({email,password})});},register:async(name,email,password)=>{return fetchAPI('/api/auth/register',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({name,email,password})});}};export const chatAPI={getChats:async userId=>{return fetchAPI(`/api/chats?userId=${userId}`);},createChat:async(participants,productId,productName)=>{return fetchAPI('/api/chats',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({participants,productId,productName})});},getMessages:async chatId=>{return fetchAPI(`/api/chats/${chatId}/messages`);},sendMessage:async(chatId,senderId,text)=>{return fetchAPI(`/api/chats/${chatId}/messages`,{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({senderId,text})});}};export const uploadAPI={uploadImage:async imageUri=>{const formData=new FormData();const response=await fetch(imageUri);const blob=await response.blob();formData.append('image',blob,'image.jpg');const uploadResponse=await fetch(`${API_URL}/api/upload`,{method:'POST',body:formData,headers:{'Content-Type':'multipart/form-data'}});if(!uploadResponse.ok){throw new Error(`Upload failed: ${uploadResponse.status}`);}return uploadResponse.json();}};export default{productAPI,authAPI,chatAPI,uploadAPI};
